---
title: Research Blog 
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  image-align: right
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: true
    comments: false
---
